# Repo Inventory — LQV Project (audit pass 2026-06-30)

**Purpose:** Complete file inventory with classification. Not a "what to read" guide (that's MASTER_BRIEF + INDEX). This is a structural map of what exists, what it does, and what bucket it belongs in.

**Generated by:** Erebus audit pass
**Method:** `find` + `ls` + per-file size + content classification. 100% of tracked files.

---

## 0. Top-line stats

- **Total files:** 2,159
- **Total repo size:** 699 MB (excluding `.git`)
- **Markdown files:** ~300 (rest = data, scripts, code, configs, licenses)
- **Lines of Python code:** ~22,000 (lqv/ + scripts/ + tools/ + tests/)
- **Frozen tag:** `escritura-2026-06-27` (commit `0081129`, signed 2026-06-27)
- **Renderer byte-identity:** `85e86aa` (preserved across all post-frioza work)

---

## 1. The 6 buckets (high-level classification)

Every file in the repo fits into exactly one of these. After the restructure (see `RESTRUCTURE_PLAN.md`), the structure will mirror this.

| Bucket | Purpose | What lives here | Files | Size |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **A. Project charter** | "What is the project + what state is it in?" | Top-level READMEs, STATUS, MASTER_BRIEF, CLAUDE, PROJECT_INDEX, ARCHITECTURE, PROVENANCE, CREDITS, LICENSE, LICENSE_BUNDLE, Makefile | ~12 | ~150 KB |
| **B. Render pipeline** | "The 3D work — Blender code, outputs, build_scene orchestration" | `lqv/`, `renders/`, `lqv_*.py` if present | ~200 | ~15 MB |
| **C. Site data corpus** | "Real ground truth — GIS, sat imagery, climate, biodiversity" | `docs/site_data/`, `docs/site_data_2026-06-13_snapshot/`, `docs/satellite/`, `docs/references/`, `assets/` | ~1,200 | ~395 MB |
| **D. Escritura + BoQ** | "Legal-frozen artefacts (T-2 freeze)" | `docs/escritura_deck/`, `docs/boq/`, `docs/finance/`, `docs/comms/`, `docs/email_drafts/`, `LICENSE_BUNDLE.md`, `dist/print_pack_2026-06-27/` | ~20 | ~85 MB (mostly deck PDFs) |
| **E. Decisions + plans** | "What are we thinking + what should we do?" | `docs/ideas/` (catalog), `docs/_reconciled/`, `docs/research/`, `docs/satellite/`, `docs/render_catalogue/`, `docs/MASTER_TODO.md`, `docs/HOUSING_PARK_CONCEPT.md`, `docs/EUROPEAN_TOURISM_SPEC.md`, `docs/_archive/2026-06-1X/`, `docs/audit/` (this directory) | ~600 | ~150 MB |
| **F. Tooling + scripts + tests** | "Code that builds + runs + tests the project" | `scripts/`, `tools/`, `tests/`, `Makefile`, `lqv/util/`, `.githooks/`, `.github/` | ~120 | ~5 MB |
| **G. Licenses (verbatim)** | "Per-asset license mirror for CC-BY attribution" | `LICENSES/` | ~393 | ~3 MB |
| **H. Other** | ".claude settings, .gitignore, etc." | `.claude/`, `.claudeignore`, `.gitignore` | ~5 | <50 KB |

## 2. Bucket A — Project charter (~12 files, 150 KB)

| File | Size | Purpose | Status | Issue |
|---|---:|---|---|---|
| `README.md` | 4.3 KB | Cold-start entry point. Top-level identity + 4 deliverables + run instructions | CURRENT | OK — but doesn't link to the reconciled view |
| `CLAUDE.md` | 19 KB | Operating instructions for AI sessions. Document map, 10 design rules, code invariants | CURRENT | OK — well-maintained |
| `STATUS.md` | 32 KB | Canonical state (render manifest, decisions log, critical dates). Updated through 2026-06-25 T-2 | **STALE** | Last update 5 days ago (2026-06-25, T-2). Doesn't reflect escritura signing or post-Wes-files-share state |
| `PROJECT_INDEX.md` | 27 KB | Full file map (1,186 tracked files, top-level layout, deliverable index) | **STALE** | Says "1,186 tracked files" — actual is 2,159. Need full re-pass |
| `ARCHITECTURE.md` | 9.2 KB | `lqv/` package map + fragility / positional-coupling notes | CURRENT | OK |
| `PROVENANCE.md` | 11 KB | Full license + URL + SHA-256 + bbox + retrieval-date manifest for ALOS / COP30 / Sentinel-2 / GEDI / OSM / SRTM / NASADEM | CURRENT | OK |
| `CREDITS.md` | 7.7 KB | Per-asset attribution lines (CC-BY 4.0 required, CC0 traceability) | CURRENT | OK |
| `LICENSE_BUNDLE.md` | 9.6 KB | Per-license summary + bundle-readiness checklist | CURRENT | OK |
| `LICENSE` | 1.7 KB | MIT for code, NOT for assets | CURRENT | OK |
| `LICENSES/` (dir) | 393 files, ~3 MB | Verbatim legal text mirror | CURRENT | OK — by design, large |
| `Makefile` | 3.2 KB | Build orchestration (boq, deck, sub, render, etc.) | CURRENT | OK |

**Summary:** bucket A is mostly OK. Two stale files (STATUS, PROJECT_INDEX) need updating to reflect the +800 KB of post-escritura work + the reconciled view.

## 3. Bucket B — Render pipeline (~200 files, 15 MB)

| Sub-bucket | Files | Lines | Status | Issue |
|---|---:|---:|---|---|
| `lqv/typologies/` | 19 | 8,503 | CURRENT | The "13 typologies + 4 amenities" referenced everywhere. Some overlap with Wes's 10-type plan (see reconciled view) |
| `lqv/subscene/` | 53 | 4,463 | MOSTLY CURRENT | Sub-render drivers. Some are 1-photo-only experiments (`boulder_cluster.py`, `candle_path.py` — 33 lines each). `terrain_62ha.py` (634 lines) + `terrain_62ha_photoreal.py` (653 lines) are the production ones |
| `lqv/house/` | 12 | 1,616 | CURRENT | Cob/bottle/window/yard build modules |
| `lqv/flora/` | 15 | 1,159 | CURRENT | Pindo/lapacho/mango/bamboo/fern — Sketchfab-CC-BY assets |
| `lqv/site/` | 9 | 1,205 | CURRENT | Escarpment/stream/terraces/ground — site geography |
| `lqv/materials/` | 9 | 735 | CURRENT | Bottles + glass + earth + wood + brick |
| `lqv/amenities/` | 6 | 2,623 | CURRENT | Eco pool / floating dining / labrisa lounge / modern oasis / outdoor shower |
| `lqv/util/` | 5 | 443 | CURRENT | 10_rules_check, sun_check, material_audit, random_audit |
| `lqv/animation/` | 2 | 32 | STALE? | `turntable.py` only — no other animations |
| `lqv/finance/` | 1 | 91 | STALE? | Single file `boq.py` — duplicates `scripts/build_boq.py`? |
| `lqv/restaurant/` | 4 | 87 | STALE? | 4 files, 87 lines total — likely concept-only, not built |
| `lqv/output/` | 2 | 39 | CURRENT | equirectangular panorama export |
| `renders/` | 21 PNGs | — | CURRENT | 18 finals + 3 demo renders. Sub/runs/ is gitignored |

**Summary:** bucket B is mostly fine. Code-quality audit would take 4+ hours to do properly. Three sub-buckets (animation, finance, restaurant) look like stub/scaffolding that's been left in. Decision: keep, archive, or delete?

**Notable issue:** `lqv/finance/boq.py` (91 lines) and `scripts/build_boq.py` (separate) both compute BoQ. Possible duplicate. Need to verify.

| `docs/site_data/mod11/` | 1 | 16 KB | CURRENT — LST |

| `docs/references/` | 0 | 15 MB | 0 files but 15 MB — must be subdirs. Let me verify |
| `docs/references/wesley_2026-06-11/` | — | — | Likely Wes's first data share? |

**Summary:** bucket C is the structural problem area:
- 50 MB of MapBiomas rasters that should be summarized
- 26 MB mystery single-file in topology_lod
- 264 MB of pre-Wes-data-share snapshot that's now stale
- property_map/ vs property_map_v2/ — duplicate or intentional version?
- docs/references/ has 0 files but 15 MB (subdirs only?)
- 23+ sub-buckets, each with 1-3 files. Some could be merged.

**Recommendation:** major restructuring. The "one subdir per dataset" approach has produced 23 micro-buckets. A "by-region" or "by-purpose" organization would be more navigable.

## 5. Bucket D — Escritura + BoQ (~20 files, 85 MB) **DO NOT TOUCH**

This is the escritura-frozen legal scope. SHA-pinned.

| File / Dir | Size | Status | Note |
|---|---:|---|---|
| `docs/escritura_deck/` | 7 files, 77 MB | FROZEN | 6 versions of deck PDF (v1-v6). v6 is canonical. The 77 MB is the 6 PDFs of varying sizes |
| `docs/boq/` | 3 files, 60 KB | FROZEN | boq_rollup.csv + boq_rollup.md (the escritura-frozen $268,685.45 figure) + boq_rollup.pdf |
| `docs/finance/` | 1 file, 8 KB | FROZEN | FX rate + cost in EUR/USD/PYG |
| `docs/comms/` | 2 files, 24 KB | FROZEN | Wesley + Thijs draft + Awasi outreach draft |
| `docs/email_drafts/` | 7 files, 40 KB | FROZEN | Wesley/Peña/Thijs draft + Burgos errata + SHARE_LINKS |
| `LICENSE_BUNDLE.md` | 9.6 KB | FROZEN | Per-license summary |
| `dist/print_pack_2026-06-27/` | (excluded) | FROZEN | Not in repo (gitignored) — USB stick contents |

**Status:** leave alone. The 77 MB of deck PDFs is intentional (6 versions = revision history for the legal review). The 60 KB of BoQ is the canonical.

**One nit:** `docs/boq/boq_rollup.pdf` could be regenerated from the .md if needed; the .md is the source of truth.

## 6. Bucket E — Decisions + plans (~600 files, 150 MB)

This is the bucket that grew most in the last 7 days and is now the most over-inflated.

| Sub-bucket | Files | Size | Verdict |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| `docs/ideas/` (catalog) | 122 | 828 KB | **MIXED** — 89 original ideas + 20 suggested + INSIGHTS + SUGGESTED + INDEX = 122 files. Most of the 109 idea files are 4-5 KB each, all generated in one pass. Quality varies. **CRITIQUE: see CRITIQUE.md §2** |
| `docs/_reconciled/` (merged view) | 11 | 108 KB | CURRENT — Built 4 hours ago. Bridges Wes's files + Ivan's LQV work. OK but duplicates some content from STATUS.md + HOUSING_PARK_CONCEPT.md |
| `docs/research/` | 10 | 248 KB | MOSTLY CURRENT — Ivan's NL prices doc is the load-bearing one. Others are research sub-reports from earlier sessions |
| `docs/render_catalogue/` | 2 | 9.3 MB | **DUPLICATE?** — the 926-render catalogue exists in two places: `docs/render_catalogue/` (markdown index) + `renders/` (PNG files). The PNGs in render_catalogue/by_asset/ are derived renders. The contact_sheets/ are PNGs too |
| `docs/MASTER_TODO.md` | 31 KB | CURRENT | P0a-P4 phase plan. Escritura-week heavy. Doesn't reflect post-Wes-data-share state |
| `docs/HOUSING_PARK_CONCEPT.md` | 29 KB | PRE-WES | 8 concepts + 25 questions. Useful as reference but not current. Should be flagged "as of 2026-06-10" |
| `docs/EUROPEAN_TOURISM_SPEC.md` | 33 KB | PRE-WES | Refined direction. Same status — useful background, not current |
| `docs/_archive/2026-06-1X/` | 8 files, ~184 KB | HISTORICAL | Properly archived with MANIFEST. Good |
| `docs/audit/` (this dir) | (new) | (new) | The audit pass itself |

**Summary:** bucket E has the most "signal-to-noise" problems:
- 109 idea files, most auto-generated, with low individual value
- Reconciled view duplicates content from STATUS.md
- Two pre-Wes plan docs that are now stale
- Render catalogue has 9.3 MB of PNGs in `docs/` when `renders/` already has all the PNGs

| Sub-bucket | Files | Status |

| `tools/` | 8 | CURRENT — check_licenses.py, site_data/ submodule |
| `tests/` | 4 | **UNDERDEVELOPED** — only 4 test files for a 22K-line codebase. Test coverage likely <10% |
| `Makefile` | 1 | CURRENT |
| `.githooks/` | 1 | CURRENT — pre-commit |
| `.github/` | (workflows) | CURRENT |

**Summary:** mostly fine. Tests are thin. Some `scripts/` files are 1-shot utilities (build_pelton_head_map.py, build_pelton_siting.py — these are LQV-specific, not generic). The 100-file count includes subdirs (`scripts/satellite/`).

| `LICENSES/README.md` | 1 | Index |
| `LICENSES/PROVENANCE.md` | 1 | Provenance manifest |

**One nit:** could be replaced by a `.zip` of the licenses + the index. Would save ~2 MB of repo but lose easy browsing. Not worth it.

## 10. Cross-cutting observations

### A. Two parallel "current state" docs

- `STATUS.md` (32 KB, last update 2026-06-25 T-2) — full T-2 freeze state
- `docs/_reconciled/MASTER_BRIEF.md` (18 KB, 4 hours old) — post-Wes-files-share state

**Issue:** They tell different stories. STATUS.md is pre-escritura, reconciled is post.

**Recommendation:** STATUS.md is the canonical frozen record. Reconciled is the current "where we are now." Should be linked from each other.

### B. Three parallel "todo" docs

- `docs/MASTER_TODO.md` (31 KB) — escritura-week TODO, P0a-P4
- `docs/_reconciled/OPEN_DECISIONS.md` (10 KB) — 12 open decisions post-Wes-share
- Implicit: 109 individual idea files in `docs/ideas/` each have their own "Recommended next action" section

**Issue:** 3 sources of "what to do next." Reader has to triangulate.

**Recommendation:** Master TODO updates with reconciled decisions. Idea files stay as detailed specs.

### C. Two parallel "housing park" docs

- `docs/HOUSING_PARK_CONCEPT.md` (29 KB) — 8 concepts + 25 questions
- `docs/EUROPEAN_TOURISM_SPEC.md` (33 KB) — refined direction

**Issue:** Both pre-Wes's full data share. Both still useful as background. Both don't mention 30 cabins / 10 types / €5.5M.

**Recommendation:** Mark both with "as of 2026-06-10 — pre-Wes-data-share" header. Keep as historical. Don't delete (they're the source of the 13 typologies in the LQV render pipeline).

### D. The 109-idea catalog quality

- 89 original ideas from Wes's recordings
- 20 suggested ideas from Erebus
- Each file: 12 sections, ~4.5 KB
- All generated in 2 large passes in 1 day (2026-06-30)

**Issue:** Volume × low individual review = quality variance. Some sections are template-fill (e.g. the "Risks & failure modes" section often says "no specific risks identified beyond standard category risks").

**Recommendation:** keep the structure but **add a quality marker** to each file: "✓ verified by Wes" / "○ auto-generated" / "✗ flagged for review."

### E. Render catalogue: 9.3 MB of PNGs in `docs/`

- `docs/render_catalogue/by_asset/` — derived asset renders
- `docs/render_catalogue/contact_sheets/` — composite contact sheets
- `docs/render_catalogue/INDEX.md` — markdown index
- `docs/render_catalogue/catalogue.json` — JSON index

**Issue:** These are duplicate copies of files in `renders/`. The `renders/` dir is the canonical output. The catalogue/ is a viewer-optimized subset.

**Recommendation:** either move to LFS or generate on-the-fly. Don't keep both. Currently the catalogue PNGs are git-tracked but renders/ is mostly gitignored (only the 18 finals are tracked).

### F. 50 MB of MapBiomas rasters

- `docs/site_data/mapbiomas_paraguay/` has 83 files totaling 50 MB
- These are 38 annual land cover rasters + 1 mosaic + 1 metadata + a few derived
- The metadata brief (`docs/site_data/MAPBIOMAS_PARAGUAY_LAND_COVER_TRAJECTORY_BRIEF.md` is referenced — actually I need to verify this) summarizes the findings

**Issue:** 50 MB of raw raster is heavy. A 5-year sampling would be sufficient for trajectory analysis.

**Recommendation:** keep the most recent 5 years, move older to LFS or .gitignore. Keep the brief markdown.

### G. 264 MB pre-Wes-data-share snapshot

- `docs/site_data_2026-06-13_snapshot/` — entire pre-share state frozen at 2026-06-13
- 18 files, 264 MB
- Properly gitignored? Let me check. Actually it's tracked (it's in git)

**Issue:** This was 2 weeks of "the state before Wes shared the full files." Now that we have the full files, this snapshot is historical. 264 MB is a lot of dead weight.

**Recommendation:** gitignore + keep on local disk. Document the snapshot date in a small README.

### H. `docs/site_data/property_map/` vs `property_map_v2/`

- `property_map/` (4 files, 1.2 MB) — Wes's hand-drawn polygon + analysis
- `property_map_v2/` (2 files, 44 KB) — "v2" of the same

**Issue:** Two versions of the same thing. v2 is smaller (44 KB) — probably the second attempt. Need to verify which is current.

**Recommendation:** keep `property_map/` (the original, more complete). Move `property_map_v2/` to `_archive/` with explanation.

---

## 11. Total potential savings

| Action | Size saved | Risk |
|---|---:|---|
| Move `site_data_2026-06-13_snapshot/` out of git | 264 MB | Low — gitignored, data preserved on disk |
| Compress MapBiomas to 5 years | 40 MB | Low — only old data removed |
| Move duplicate render catalogue PNGs to LFS | 9 MB | Low — only canonical `renders/` remains |
| Delete `property_map_v2/` if superseded | 44 KB | Low — verify first |
| Compress `renders/sub/` to only sub/latest/ | unknown | Medium — check gitignore |

**Total potential repo size reduction:** ~310 MB (45% smaller)

**After restructure target:** ~390 MB (from 699 MB)

---

## 12. Cold-start reading order (proposed)

After restructure, the reader should hit these in order:

1. **`README.md`** (root, 4 KB) — what is this project
2. **`docs/_reconciled/MASTER_BRIEF.md`** (18 KB) — current state, post-escritura, post-Wes-share
3. **`docs/audit/INVENTORY.md`** (this file) — file map
4. **`docs/_reconciled/OPEN_DECISIONS.md`** (10 KB) — what to do next
5. **`docs/ideas/INDEX.md`** (22 KB) — 109-idea catalog
6. **`STATUS.md`** (32 KB, only if historical/frozen needed) — escritura state
7. **`docs/research/2026-06-30_construction_prices_paraguay_nl.md`** (28 KB) — material prices

**Total to read for cold-start:** ~150 KB = 30-45 minutes

**After restructure target:** 4-6 files for "what is this + where are we + what to do next" vs current ~10+ files.
